name: no-commitment
description: A status-check call with vague intentions but zero explicit promises. The correct answer is an empty commitments list — every extracted task is a false positive.

dialogue.content: Hi, this is Morgan at Beacon Insurance.
Hey Morgan, just checking whether anything changed on my policy.
Let me look. No, nothing has changed since your last renewal.
Okay good. Maybe at some point we should review my coverage levels.
That's always a good idea eventually. Renewal season might be a natural time.
Yeah, we'll figure it out down the road. Thanks for checking.
